title: Dungeons & Origins - DnO
description: RPG modpack with adventures boss fights skills and Origins + This is a really hard Rpg
body:
# Dungeons & Origins
Welcome to Dungeons & Origins, a modpack built to be a RPG type game. I made this pack mainly to play it with my friends but any one can use it now because I want you to have fun on it too. 

This was published by **ArtisticAxolotl** but **TheRealArk** made the modpack and most of the description

**None** of the mods were made by us

### What it aims for
This modpack aims to be a fair RPG and survival modpack with adventures and boss fights. Some mods you can see in **Credits**, and the people who made them.

### Please Do
When installed please turn on resource packs to make it look cooler.

## Pictures

![Graveyard Building](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da4abde7ef75be3b6535360b9b1be7420973821b_0.webp)

- mariumbacchus for making: Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
- Pufferfish for making: Pufferfish's Skills

- SparkUniverse for making: Essential Mod
- And More
